name: project-legibility
description: Keep long-running repository work coherent, verifiable, and easy to resume.

interface.shortDescription: Keep long-running repository work coherent and easy to resume.
interface.longDescription: Carry context across tasks, check the right behavior before editing, and leave code and documentation easier to understand.
defaultPrompt: Find where work last stopped in this repository and continue safely.
Before editing, check which existing behavior and constraints this change should preserve.
Implement and verify this so the work is easy to understand and continue in a later task.
